summary: Focused r2 (non-authoring, fresh context) verifying the Rev 2 folds of critic-r1's two blockers + AD1-AD5. Both blockers faithfully and completely folded, verified empirically on the pre-edit tree (HEAD 11f26a3). BL1: the fenced VC2 grep runs valid ERE (pipe-free -e patterns), NON-EMPTY exit 0 with 12 independent line-hits covering all 8 identity sites + the 3 shipped docs; patterns tight enough that excluded archival files do not match anyway and provenance section headers '(v0.1.1)/(v0.1.3)' are NOT caught, so post-edit EMPTY is achievable without disturbing KEEP provenance; acceptance states proven-NON-EMPTY-pre / EMPTY-post with a vacuous check FAILing. BL2: NOTION_EXPORT_SUMMARY.md:13 now in Relevant Files + T016.1 Files + Findings + Acceptance; archival allowlist enumerated with per-file rationale; independent broad sweep finds every live product-identity hit inside T016.1 scope or the allowlist. AD1: doctor source confirms exactly 7 FORBIDDEN_CODEX_LEXEMES + 2 CODEX_REQUIRED_SUBSTRINGS, reproduced verbatim in VC4 + the honesty criterion. AD2-AD5 all present and accurate. dmc validate plan VALID exit 0; no new defect. APPROVE with 4 low advisories, none blocking. Advisory only: opens no gate (C11); approval is a Human Release Gate record.

advisories.statement: VC4 uses word-boundary while the doctor's codex_forbidden_hits uses plain substring — VC4 is stricter-scoped (won't flag compounds like reinforced/unenforced). Acceptable; add a one-line note so readers don't infer VC4 is byte-identical to the runtime check.

VC4 is line-based: a wide matrix table row placing a claude 'enforced' cell and a codex cell on the SAME line trips as a layout artifact. Authoring constraint: render one harness per line (or keep codex cells on lines free of enforced-class lexemes).

Broad-grep hand-review will surface analytical version-RANGE references (docs/HARNESS_LANDSCAPE_2026.md 'DMC v0.1-v0.5', HARNESS_BENCHMARK_CARDS_2026.md) not named in the allowlist — add an 'analytical/historical version-range references' allowlist category at execution.
VC2 --exclude flags are redundant-but-harmless (tight patterns don't match archival files; _DMC_*.md not in search paths). No action; noted so the excludes aren't assumed load-bearing.
